calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given, and there being no appearance or objection, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eric Della Santa, of Powers Miller, Tel. 916.924.7900, for defendants Rene Thomas, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

Ruling: DEFENDANT RENE THOMAS Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One, And Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is granted in whole. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Stephen Zollman; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Continued To Jun-26-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance by Plaintiff's Counsel. Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set June-26-2018 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; ClerkJLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Continued To Apr-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to April 17, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
